patch.value: GH-551: dependency seeds reject source_kind and rewrite cross-workspace IDs
Align the documented dependency seed contract with runtime behavior and make cross-workspace relationship IDs explicit and lossless instead of silently applying the local id_prefix.

The CLI either accepts and preserves documented source_kind for external dependencies or removes it with a safe replacement; external IDs are never silently rewritten; help, SDK contracts, validation, and integration tests agree.

value.author: codex-gpt5
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-14: pm search GH-551 --status all returned no item. This is related to the active relationship registry lineage pm-ju83 but is not implemented in the current in-memory graph primitive bundle. Source: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/551
